knowledge_base.title: Reset Password
knowledge_base.description: To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the ServiceNow login page. A reset link will be sent to your email.

knowledge_base.title: VPN Access Issue
knowledge_base.description: If your VPN fails, verify Cisco AnyConnect credentials and network connection. Contact IT if the issue persists.

knowledge_base.title: Account Locked
knowledge_base.description: Accounts lock after 5 failed logins. Wait 15 minutes or call Service Desk to unlock it manually.

knowledge_base.title: New Laptop Request
knowledge_base.description: Go to Service Catalog → Hardware → Laptop Request and submit your request.

knowledge_base.title: Incident Creation
knowledge_base.description: In Service Portal, click 'Report an Issue', fill in short description and details, then click 'Submit'.

knowledge_base.title: Software Request
knowledge_base.description: Visit Service Catalog → Software → Request Software. Choose the software and submit the form.

knowledge_base.title: VPN Setup Guide
knowledge_base.description: To set up VPN, install Cisco AnyConnect, enter VPN URL, and log in with your credentials.

knowledge_base.title: Service Request Approval
knowledge_base.description: Managers can approve or reject requests in 'My Approvals' within the ServiceNow portal.

knowledge_base.title: Incident Status Check
knowledge_base.description: Navigate to 'My Incidents' to view your open and closed incidents.

knowledge_base.title: MFA Setup
knowledge_base.description: Go to Preferences → Security → MFA and scan the QR code with the Authenticator app.
